data.title: Add start.bat / stop.bat for clean local startup + shutdown

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): the batch files PASS cold review — pure ASCII (0 non-ASCII bytes), bounded health/api wait loops, correct enabledelayedexpansion, errorlevel guards on every step, correct start "navi-server" cmd /c launch, curl /health poll logic sound, stop.bat PID-by-port + taskkill /T + docker compose stop (non-destructive, volume preserved), idempotent + safe-when-nothing-running, startup contract matches docker-compose.yml/config.py/api.py/README. One BLOCKING issue: a stray 0-byte 'API' file was accidentally committed in 97a7359. Rework: removed it in the follow-up commit (git rm API); repo root verified clean (only start.bat/stop.bat added). Non-blocking nits (acceptable): no port-8000-precheck (could false-positive 'up' if another process holds 8000); stop picks last LISTENING PID (fine for IPv4-only localhost bind). -> done.
